title: camonea kingii
intro: Camonea kingii, commonly known as King's Camamile, is a perennial plant native to Europe, Western Asia, and North Africa, whose dried flowers are used in herbal medicine. The health benefits of King's Camamile include its ability to promote relaxation and reduce anxiety, as well as its soothing effects on the digestive system. Its therapeutic actions include acting as an anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic, which can help to ease restlessness and promote a good night's sleep. The bioactive constituents of King's Camamile include flavonoids, such as apigenin and luteolin, and sesquiterpene lactones, which contribute to its medicinal properties.
intro_study: According to "Zhongguo Zhong yao za zhi = Zhongguo zhongyao zazhi = China journal of Chinese materia medica", Camonea kingii benefits include inhibiting melanin production, exhibiting anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, antibacterial, and immune regulation properties.
side_effects: Camonea kingii can have side effects if used improperly, such as causing allergic reactions, skin irritation, and respiratory problems in some individuals. Improper use of the plant can also lead to gastrointestinal issues, including nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea. In rare cases, consuming or inhaling the plant's toxic compounds can cause more severe side effects, such as seizures, coma, or even death. It's essential to consult with a medical professional or a qualified herbalist before using Camonea kingii for any health benefits.
